tools.name: list_plugins
tools.description: List available plugins with their names, descriptions, and versions. Reads from a plugins directory or marketplace.json. Auto-detects the plugins directory when neither is specified.

params.name: plugins_dir
params.description: Path to plugins directory (auto-detected if omitted)

tools.name: install_skill
tools.description: Install a skill into a target directory by symlink (default) or copy. Pass dry_run=true to preview without writing. Requires user confirmation before running without dry_run.

params.name: skill
params.description: Skill name or path to install

params.name: skills_dir
params.description: Root skills directory to search in (auto-detected if omitted)

params.name: dry_run
params.description: Set to 'true' to preview without writing anything

tools.name: verify_install
tools.description: Verify that skills in a directory are valid: SKILL.md present, frontmatter complete, all declared tool scripts exist. Returns a pass/fail summary.

params.name: target
params.description: Directory containing installed skills to verify
